mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM mall_product p LEFT JOIN mall_category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mall_product (name, category_id, main_image, images, description, price, original_price, stock, sales, status, sort) VALUES (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM mall_product WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE mall_product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
